headlessDescription: This agent runs without a terminal. It communicates via MCP tools and the inbox system.
headlessStreamDescription: This agent runs headlessly. Live work appears in the runtime dock ticker and inspect panel; formal replies must be sent with message tools.
noStreamingOutputYet: There is no streaming output to show yet.
chooseRuntime: Choose an AI runtime to add to your team
addActorSubtitle: Set the basics, choose how the actor runs, and only expand advanced options when needed.
customCommandHint: Provide a command for your runtime in <1>Advanced options → Command Override</1>.
configureMcpStdio: Configure your runtime to add an MCP stdio server named
addMcpConfigOrFlag: 2) Add this MCP server config (or pass it via
restartAfterConfig: Restart the runtime after updating this config.
foremanLeads: Foreman leads the team. Peers are worker agents.
firstAgentForeman: First agent must be the foreman (team leader).
autoloadCapabilitiesHint: One capability ID per line (or comma-separated). These are auto-enabled when the actor starts.
secretsStoredLocally: Stored locally under <1>CCCC_HOME/state/…</1> (not in group ledger). Values are never shown again.
secretsFormat: Supports <1>KEY=VALUE</1> plus pasted <2>export / set / $env:</2> forms (quotes / semicolons / inline comments).
addSectionBasicsHint: Set the actor name, team role, and long-lived work stance before choosing how it runs.
sectionBasicsHint: Edit the actor label, built-in role preset seed, and stable actor-scoped role notes here.
sectionRuntimeHint: Choose a runtime profile or custom runtime config. Role presets above only affect role notes.
sectionAdvancedHint: Keep low-frequency configuration here so the main edit path stays short.
runtimeSetupSectionHint: Show runtime-specific MCP setup only when you need to wire a client manually.
secretsSectionHint: Only open this when you need to rotate keys or change private runtime environment.
capabilitiesSectionHint: Only open this when you need to change autoloaded capabilities for the actor.
profileToolsSectionHint: Save the current custom runtime setup into the reusable runtime profile library.
leaveEmptyForId: Leave empty to use the agent ID as display name
avatarHint: Shared actor image used in chat. Applies immediately and does not need restart.
runnerModeHint: Use PTY for terminal interaction. Use Headless for structured event flows.
runnerModeHeadlessNote: Only some runtimes (e.g. `codex`, `claude`) support Headless mode. Other runtimes stay on PTY.
runtimeChangesNote: Runtime/command changes take effect after restart. Use "Save & Restart" to apply immediately.
hoverToPreviewMasked: Hover a key to preview a masked value.
pendingConvertSecretsPreview: Previewing keys from the linked profile (pending convert). Click Save or Save & Restart to apply to this actor.
secretsAppliedNote: Secrets are applied when you click <1>Save</1> or <1>Save & Restart</1> below.
setUpdate: Set / Update (supports KEY=VALUE, export, set, $env:, quotes, semicolons)
unset: Unset (supports unset KEY / set KEY= / Remove-Item Env:KEY / KEY / KEY=, with semicolons)
clearAllKeys: Clear all secret keys on save
failedToLoadSecrets: Failed to load secret env metadata
secretsStoredLocallyEdit: Stored locally under <1>CCCC_HOME/state/…</1> (not in group ledger).
saveAndRestartConfirm: Save changes and restart "{{label}}" now? This will interrupt any running work.
saveSecretsAndRestartConfirm: Save changes, apply secrets, and restart "{{label}}" now? This will interrupt any running work.
savedRestartRequired: Saved. Restart "{{label}}" to apply runtime/profile/secret changes.
scopeAlreadyAttached: This directory already has a working group. Opening it instead.
createdButFailedAttach: Created group but failed to attach: {{message}}
destGroupDifferent: Destination group must be different from the source group.
commandOverrideRequired: Command override is enabled. Please enter a command.
selectProfileFirst: Please select a runtime profile first.
useSavedProfileNowConfirm:
Saved "{{name}}" to Runtime Profiles.

Use this profile for "{{actor}}" now?

OK: switch to this profile now
Cancel: keep current custom config
profileSelectedPendingSave: Runtime profile "{{name}}" selected. Click Save or Save & Restart to apply.
profileAttachedPendingRestart: Switched to runtime profile "{{name}}". Click Save & Restart to apply runtime changes.
linkedProfileHint: Runtime, command, and secrets are managed by this profile. Applied revision: {{revision}}.
convertToCustomConfirm: Convert this actor to custom now? It will snapshot current profile config and secrets.
convertToCustomConfirmWithName: Convert "{{name}}" to custom now? It will snapshot current profile config and secrets.
managedByProfile: This actor is managed by a Runtime Profile.
managedByProfileCustomHint: Convert to Custom to unlock manual runtime, command, and secret editing.
profileControlsRuntimeFields: Runtime and command are runtime-profile controlled. Convert to custom to edit them.
linkedSecretsHint: Secrets are managed by the linked runtime profile. Edit them in Settings > Actor Profiles.
connectionLostDescription: Terminal connection failed. The agent process may have stopped or the server is unreachable.
roleNotesHint: Stored in CCCC_HELP.md as this actor's `## @actor:` block. Use it for stable local guidance, not temporary tasks.
newActorRoleNotesHint: Saved as this actor's `## @actor:` block when you create the actor. Use it for stable local guidance, not temporary tasks.
roleNotesPlaceholder: Describe only this actor's local responsibilities, boundaries, and preferred behavior…
rolePresetHint: Built-in presets are quick copy-on-apply starting points for this actor's role notes.
rolePresetSelectPrompt: Choose a preset, then apply it into the draft below.

coordinator.name: Coordinator
coordinator.summary: Keep multi-actor work moving through clear ownership, low-noise routing, and clean handoffs without acting like a second foreman.
coordinator.useWhen: Use when work is drifting, ownership is fuzzy, or handoffs are getting messy, but the main need is coordination rather than final acceptance.

planner.name: Planner
planner.summary: Turn vague requests into executable scope with boundaries, acceptance, and unresolved decisions made explicit.
planner.useWhen: Use when the request is ambiguous, risky, or large enough that acting now would likely create rework.

implementer.name: Implementer
implementer.summary: Ship the smallest correct change that matches approved scope, fits local patterns, and is actually verified.
implementer.useWhen: Use when scope is already approved and the real job is to land working code or scripts cleanly.

reviewer.name: Reviewer
reviewer.summary: Inspect the actual work against the real requirement and only flag issues that would cause real problems.
reviewer.useWhen: Use when an implementation step is done and someone needs a real review rather than a summary blessing.

debugger.name: Debugger
debugger.summary: Reproduce the failure, narrow the real cause with evidence, and apply only the fix that matches the failure path.
debugger.useWhen: Use when behavior is broken, flaky, or unexplained and naive fixes are already failing or too risky.

explorer.name: Explorer
explorer.summary: Map the local repo into a small set of anchor files and behavior flows without drifting into edits or external research.
explorer.useWhen: Use when the real question is where something lives or how it flows inside this repo.

researcher.name: Researcher
researcher.summary: Answer external technical questions from primary sources with clear source basis and version or recency boundaries.
researcher.useWhen: Use when the answer depends on external docs, source, releases, issues, or current upstream behavior.

rolePresetAppliedNotice: Preset "{{name}}" copied into the role-notes draft.
rolePresetAlreadyMatchesDraft: Preset "{{name}}" already matches the current draft.
rolePresetReplaceConfirm: Replace the current role-notes draft with the built-in preset "{{name}}"?
actorCreatedRoleNotesSaveFailed: Actor "{{actor}}" was created, but saving role notes failed: {{message}}
actorCreatedSetupFailed: Actor "{{actor}}" was created, but follow-up setup failed: {{details}}
noRecentTerminalOutput: No recent terminal output was captured.
